task.title: Replay a failed run
task.shortdesc: Replay a run after fixing a transient issue such as credentials or network instability.

ul.li: You have a failed run_id (for example, run_456).
You have remediated the root cause (for example, updated connector credentials).

step.cmd: Create a replay request for the run.
Check the response for the new run_id.
Monitor the new run to completion.

result.p: The service has created a new run based on the original run configuration.
